description: Sales lead / prospect. Tracks initial interest from potential customers through qualification.
semantic_description: A sales lead representing a potential customer who has shown interest. Tracked from initial capture through qualification or disqualification.
lifecycle_description: NEW → CONTACTED → QUALIFIED → LOST (also NEW → LOST)

description: Company or organization that is a customer or prospect.
semantic_description: A company or organization record. Central entity linking contacts and opportunities.
lifecycle_description: No status lifecycle — accounts are long-lived reference entities.

description: Individual person associated with an account.
semantic_description: A person at a customer company. Linked to an account for organizational context.
lifecycle_description: No status lifecycle — contacts are reference entities.

description: Sales opportunity with pipeline stage tracking and expected revenue.
semantic_description: A sales deal being pursued. Tracks pipeline stage from prospecting through close (won or lost).
